Issue with sensor found and partial correction in place resulting in lower emissions estimates given the sensor can be reset to read accurately. In between resets, the sensor over estimates the concentration of ClO2

comments.comment: 2023 was very unusual year for mill with total mill down for 3 months and restarting only half of the mill, the kraft mill continues to operate while paper mill is down for indefinite period.
